gate_title: Planning and gate-foundation entry into external readiness
failure_mode_if_skipped: External onboarding starts without an execution graph, risk posture, or traceability foundation and later gates become title-driven instead of evidence-driven.
notes: Planning only completes when programme graph, risk/watch posture, traceability, and Phase 0 gate foundation are published.

gate_title: External readiness entry into Phase 0 foundation work
failure_mode_if_skipped: Phase 0 begins without partner-path visibility, simulator posture, or manual checkpoint truth and later merge gates discover hidden approvals too late.
notes: Optional PDS and deferred NHS App onboarding stay inventoried but are not required for current-baseline Phase 0 entry.

failure_mode_if_skipped: Optional PDS work silently mutates baseline identity truth without governed legal-basis and feature-flag posture.
notes: Optional PDS remains outside the current baseline unless later explicitly enabled.

gate_title: Phase 0A hard gate into 0B domain kernel
failure_mode_if_skipped: Domain kernel work starts before repository boundaries, startup, and delivery controls are hard-gated.
notes: This is the first hard gate in the Phase 0 internal sub-phase map.

gate_title: Phase 0B hard gate into 0C runtime publication substrate
failure_mode_if_skipped: Runtime and release work starts without the canonical kernel, state axes, and coordinator-owned closure law frozen enough for later phases.
notes: 0B must finish before runtime publication and release tuples are treated as meaningful.

gate_title: Phase 0C hard gate into 0D control governors
failure_mode_if_skipped: Control-plane work begins without runtime publication, watch, and release tuple law frozen.
notes: 0C makes runtime publication a foundation concern rather than late hardening.

gate_title: Phase 0D hard gate into 0E verification and contract publication
failure_mode_if_skipped: Verification and shell work starts before tenant scope, mutation law, and degraded-mode control tuples are authoritative.
notes: 0D freezes control-plane law before later shells and tests can rely on it.

failure_mode_if_skipped: Parallel implementation opens without verification, simulator, and contract-publication law already pinned.
notes: This is the explicit gate that opens the Phase 0 parallel foundation tracks named by the checklist.

gate_title: Phase 0 hard gate from 0F synthetic flow into 0G assurance closeout
failure_mode_if_skipped: Phase 0 closeout starts before same-shell parity, synthetic flow, and publication parity are proven.
notes: 0F must complete before assurance and exit signoff close the foundation.

failure_mode_if_skipped: Foundation exit proceeds while long-lead safety, privacy, and partner approvals remain invisible or stale.
notes: All named long-lead tracks must be visible before Phase 0 exit proof can settle.

failure_mode_if_skipped: Feature phases start while release tuple, recovery posture, or long-lead assurance evidence is still stale.
notes: Phase 0 exit freezes the spine before later phases may build on it.

failure_mode_if_skipped: Phase 1 intake parallel merge is skipped and later sequence work outruns the required evidence tuple or conformance posture.
notes: Phase 1 intake parallel merge keeps its evidence tuple explicit and scope-aware in the programme graph.
